since_last: 35% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.98%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.03% · BTC -0.83% · Gold +1.85% · Nasdaq100 -0.34%. 35% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.98%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.98%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +21.27%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +21.27%, DELL +8.88%, NRG +4.83%, CEG +4.58%, HPE +3.79%. Laggards: PATH -13.50%, GEV -7.95%, PLTR -6.71%, NOW -6.60%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.82% at $118.82
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.82% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
